title: Petco Health and Wellness Co Inc (WOOF) Q2 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Petco Health and Wellness Co Inc (WOOF) Q2 2024 Earnings Report Preview. Earnings Details: Petco was set to release Q2 2024 earnings on September 10, 2024. The consensus revenue estimate was $1.52 billion, with expected earnings of -$0.06 per share. For the full year 2024, analysts projected revenue of $6.15 billion and earnings of -$0.27 per share. Recent Performance: In the previous quarter (April 30, 2024), Petco exceeded revenue expectations of $1.51 billion, delivering $1.53 billion. However, earnings disappointed, coming in at -$0.17 per share versus the expected -$0.10 per share. Analyst Outlook: According to 13 analysts, the average 12-month price target is $3.42, suggesting potential upside of 17.23% from the then-current price of $2.92. The consensus recommendation from 15 brokerage firms indicates a Hold status, with an average rating of 2.9 on a scale where 1 represents Strong Buy.
